params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a register file with eight 8-bit registers. It allows for reading from two registers specified by 3-bit input addresses (addr1 and addr2) and provides their contents on the outputs data_out1 and data_out2. The module also supports writing 8-bit data (data_in) to a register addressed by addr1 when the write enable signal (write_en) is asserted. The write enable state is captured on the falling edge of a clock signal, ensuring synchronized write operations.
